# Issue tracker

// Generated by projen. To modify, edit .projenrc.ts and run "pnpm exec projen".

We use a local markdown-based issue tracker.

New issues are created as markdown files under `.scratch/<feature>/<issue>.md`.

Each issue file should include metadata at the top for triage tracking:

```markdown
---
status: needs-triage  # One of: needs-triage, needs-info, ready-for-agent, ready-for-human, wontfix
title: Feature request
---
```

## External PRs as a request surface

Not applicable — we are using a local markdown issue tracker.
